headline: ₹50-200 Cr at risk (passive fund rebalancing range, not immediate loss) — Adani Power earns ESG 1+ rating from CARE, enhancing disclosure credibility but limited direct financial impact.
what_matters: Possible minor P/E uplift if included in ESG indices; no immediate margin or revenue impact.
Aligns with BRSR, GRI, ESRS, and DJSI frameworks; reduces risk of SEBI scrutiny or penalties.
Potential for marginally lower cost of capital and minor ESG fund inflows; no material bond spread change expected.
